steps.title: Translate the percentage statement into an equation
steps.content:
The phrase 5% of $w$ is 741.41 translates directly to an equation. Rewrite 5% as the decimal 0.05:
$$0.05w = 741.41$$

steps.title: Solve for w by dividing by 0.05
steps.content:
Divide both sides by 0.05. Dividing by 0.05 is equivalent to multiplying by 20 (the reciprocal):
$$w = \frac{741.41}{0.05} = 741.41 \times 20 = 14,828.2$$
That matches choice C — C is correct.
